transcription.text: Still doing those bills, hon? Just wrestling with the credit card balance. You've been feeding on those high interest rates. I just switched our balance over to a Capital One No Hassle card. We're gonna save 500 bucks a year. 500 bucks? Switch your high interest balance to the Capital One No Hassle card for the nation's lowest long-term fixed rates. You could save up to $500 a year. What's in your wallet?
